welcome.title: Welcome to APS
welcome.subtitle: Choose your profile to access your personalized dashboard

athlete.title: Athlete
athlete.description: View your training schedule and progress

guardian.title: Guardian
guardian.description: Track your child's progress and payments

login.title: Login
login.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
login.noAdminPrivileges: You do not have administrator privileges.
login.welcomeReportsViewer: Welcome! You can view data and generate reports.
login.coachDescription: Access your coaching dashboard to manage athletes
login.athleteDescription: View your training schedule and progress
login.guardianDescription: Track your child's progress and manage payments
login.adminDescription: Full access to school management system

userManual.title: User Manual
userManual.subtitle: Complete guide to using the APS Surf School platform

login.title: How to Login
login.description: Steps to access the coach portal
login.step1: Go to the home page and select 'Coach'
login.step2: Enter your Coach ID (e.g., T01) and Password

dashboard.title: Main Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of the coach control panel
dashboard.feature1: View monthly summary of training sessions

attendance.title: Attendance Registration (Individual)
attendance.description: How to register an athlete's attendance individually
attendance.step1: Select the athlete from the athlete list
attendance.step3: Fill in the fields: Date, Shift (Morning/Afternoon), and Beach Location
attendance.step4: Optionally add photos or videos using the upload button

bulk.title: Bulk Attendance Registration
bulk.description: How to register multiple athletes' attendance at once
bulk.step3: Check the athletes who attended using the checkboxes
bulk.step4: Set the status for each athlete (Present/Absent/Justified)
bulk.step5: Add beach location and optional notes
bulk.step6: Click 'Submit Attendance' to register all at once

profile.title: Athlete Profile
profile.feature1: View athlete personal data (name, date of birth, address)
profile.feature3: See current surf level of the athlete

championships.title: Championships
championships.feature2: Enroll athletes in championships by selecting from the list

internships.title: Internships
internships.feature2: Enroll athletes in internships by selecting from the list

history.title: Training History
history.description: View and export complete training history
history.feature1: Filter training sessions by date, athlete, or beach location
history.feature2: Export detailed reports in PDF format

payments.title: Coach Payments
payments.feature1: View complete history of payments received
payments.feature2: Filter payments by year and month

logout.title: Logout
logout.description: To exit the platform, click the 'Logout' button at the top of the page

login.title: How to Login
login.description: Steps to access the athlete portal
login.step1: Go to the home page and select 'Athlete'
login.step2: Enter your Athlete ID (e.g., A01) and Password

tabs.title: Available Tabs
tabs.personal: Personal Data - Personal information and contacts
tabs.media: Media - Photo and video gallery from training

personal.title: Personal Data
personal.feature2: Check date of birth, address, and phone number
personal.feature4: Verify parents' emergency contacts (Mother and Father)

training.title: Training Information
training.feature1: See number of weekly training sessions
training.feature2: Check which days of the week have training

attendance.title: Attendance and Summaries
attendance.feature1: Navigate between months using left/right arrows
attendance.feature3: Check monthly and annual attendance summaries

championships.title: Championships
championships.feature1: View list of championships you are enrolled in
championships.feature2: Check details: name, location, dates, and category

media.title: Media Gallery
media.description: View and download training photos and videos
media.feature1: View photos taken during training sessions
media.feature3: Download photos and videos to your device

internships.title: Internships
internships.feature1: View list of internships you are enrolled in
internships.feature2: Check details: name, location, and dates

refresh.title: Refresh Data
refresh.description: To update the data displayed on the dashboard, click the refresh button (rotation icon) at the top of the page

logout.title: Logout
logout.description: To exit the platform, click the 'Logout' button at the top of the page

login.title: How to Login
login.description: Steps to access the guardian portal
login.step1: Go to the home page and select 'Parents and Family'
login.step2: Enter your Guardian ID (e.g., PA01) and Password

family.title: Family Area
family.feature1: If you have multiple children, you can select between them
family.feature2: Easily switch between different athlete profiles

tabs.title: Available Tabs
tabs.media: Media - Photos and videos from training

overview.title: Overview
overview.feature1: View athlete card with photo, name, and surf level
overview.feature4: See list of most recent payments

pack.title: Pack Summary
pack.description: View training pack balance and history
pack.feature2: Check number of sessions already used

payments.title: Payment History
payments.feature1: View complete history of payments made
payments.feature2: Filter payments by year and month

media.title: Media Gallery
media.description: View your child's training photos and videos
media.feature1: View photos from your child's training sessions
media.feature3: Download photos and videos to your device

championships.title: Championships
championships.feature1: View championships your child is enrolled in
championships.feature2: Check details of each championship (name, location, dates)

internships.title: Internships
internships.feature1: View internships your child is enrolled in
internships.feature2: Check details of each internship (name, location, dates)

logout.title: Logout
logout.description: To exit the platform, click the 'Logout' button at the top of the page
